name: omlx-large
description: 50-game variance-analysis profile against local omlx + Qwen3.5-9B-DeepSeek-V4-Flash-4bit. Same shape as omlx-qwen35 but larger N, so a single regression has a more reliable signal. Bump to 100 only if stddev across runs is wider than the gate bands. Expects the host omlx server on localhost:8000.
